briefdescription.para: command id for SSIT slaves sync
command id for SSIT master sync
command id for SSIT slaves wait
command id for set WDT param
command id for inplace plm update
command id for set ipi access
command id for list mask write
command id for list mask poll
command id for secure communication configuration
command id to get secure communication status
command id to get secure communication status
command id for In-Place ASU firmware update
This file contains the xilplmi API IDs.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 dd 01/09/24 Initial release pre 07/10/24 Added support for configure secure communication command pre 09/30/24 Added support for get secure communication status command pre 10/19/24 Added XPLMI_HEADER_LEN_5 and XPLMI_HEADER_LEN_6 macros pre 01/13/25 Added command to set access status of DDRMC main registers vm 03/16/26 Added XPLMI_INPLACE_ASU_UPDATE_CMD_ID command vm 04/16/26 Update In-Place ASUFW update command ID
